resourceTemplates.name: gradium-get-voices
resourceTemplates.title: List Gradium voices
resourceTemplates.description: Lists voices for the authenticated organization. Supports pagination via skip/limit and optional inclusion of catalog voices.

resourceTemplates.name: gradium-get-voice
resourceTemplates.title: Get Gradium voice
resourceTemplates.description: Get a voice by UID. Returns catalog or custom voice metadata including name, language, tags, and clone info.
